title: Requirements for Accreditation and renewal of POSE with Philippine
content: 14 Flagship. The Department shall accredit POSE with Philippine flagship upon submission 15 of the following requirements: 16 17 A. Owned tonnage: 18 19 1. Letter request of the ship owner with the inclusion of the following information: 20 i. That the company is the owner of the ship for enrollment; 21 22 ii. Former name of the enterprise (if any); and 23 24 iii. Ex-name of the ship (if any). 25 26 2. Valid certificate of accreditation issued by MARINA that the company is an 27 accredited maritime enterprise; 28 29 3. Valid special permit granted to the ship to engage in the overseas trade; 30 31 4. Valid certificate of Philippine registry of ship with IMO number; and 32 33 5. Accomplished salary scale forms. 34 35 B. Under bareboat charter: 36 37 1. Letter request of the charterer with the inclusion of the following information: 38 39 i. That the company is the bareboat charterer of the ship for enrollment; 40 ii. Former name of the enterprise (if any); 41 42 iii. Ex-name of the ship (if any). 43 44 2. Valid certificate of accreditation issued by MARINA that the company is an 45 accredited maritime enterprise; 46 47 3. MARINA approval of the bareboat charter of the ship; 48 49 4. Valid certificate of Philippines registry of ship with IMO number; and 50 51 5. Accomplished salary scale forms. 52 53 C. With manning agency tie-up: 54 55 1. Letter request of the manning agency with the inclusion of the following 56 information: 57 58 i. That the enlisted shipping enterprise is the owner/bareboat charterer of the ship 59 for enrollment; 60 61 ii. Former name of the shipping enterprise (if any); and 62 37 iii. Ex-name of the ship (if any). 1 2 2. Notarized manning agreement and SPA between the enlisted shipping enterprise 3 and LMA; 4 5 3. Valid certificate of accreditation issued by MARINA that the company is an 6 accredited maritime enterprise; 7 8 4. Crew request from the shipping enterprise addressed to the manning agency; 9 10 5. Valid certificate of Philippine registry of the ship with IMO number; 11 12 6. Accomplished salary scale forms; and 13 14 7. Additional requirements: 15 16 i. Owned tonnage: 17 - Valid special permit granted to the ship to engage in the overseas trade 18 ii. Bareboat charterer: 19 - MARINA approval of the bareboat charter of the ship 20 21 The Department, in accordance with law and after consultation with the stakeholders, 22 may modify the list or prescribe additional requirements for the accreditation of POSEs. 23 24
